mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO qb_attempt_question(attempt_id, question_id, order_no, score, snapshot_json, snapshot_hash, question_type, difficulty, tag_ids_json) VALUES
(#{it.attemptId}, #{it.questionId}, #{it.orderNo}, #{it.score}, #{it.snapshotJson}, #{it.snapshotHash}, #{it.questionType}, #{it.difficulty}, #{it.tagIdsJson})
